caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary. The screen is divided into two sections: on the left, there is an image of a man wearing traditional attire, likely Bola Tinubu, with the headline "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu" displayed below. On the right side, a political analyst named Olusola Oyekanmi, based in Lagos, is shown as being interviewed over the phone. The setting suggests a discussion or analysis of Tinubu's statement and its implications for Nigerian politics. The PlusTV logo and website URL are also visible, indicating where viewers can watch the content online. The overall tone of the video seems to be informative and analytical, aimed at providing insights into current political events in Nigeria.
